dashboard.subtitle: Track your drone orders and get support

actions.supportDesc: Raise a ticket or get help

support.title: Support & Troubleshooting
support.description: Please describe your issue in detail...
support.ticketCreated: Ticket created successfully! Our team will contact you soon.

bot.welcome: Hello! I am your automated support assistant. Please select a component or issue category below to start troubleshooting.
bot.unsolvedUser: No, it is still not working.
bot.unsolvedBot: I see. Would you like to raise a support ticket or contact us directly?
bot.sorry: We're sorry we couldn't help automatically.

questions.compass_a1:
1. Connect the Drone.
2. Go to Setting/Right Top Corner Three Dots.
3. Go to Drone Icon.
4. Click on Compass Calibration. The drone LED will blink.
questions.compass_q2: Is there any Metal obstacle at takeoff site?
questions.compass_a2:
1. Connect the Drone to Battery.
2. Perform the compass Calibration and check the Satellites.
3. If the Magnetic Interference is still displaying, change the takeoff site.
questions.flow_q1: For which fertilizer they are using (Powder/Liquid)?
questions.flow_a1:
1. Fill the tank till 10 litre water and power the Drone.
2. Go to Setting/Right Top Corner Three Dots.
3. Go to Drone Icon.
4. Click Spray Parameter. Choose the Liquid Type.
questions.flow_q2: Drone Sprays Too Much or Too Little
questions.flow_a2:
1. Verify and adjust the flow rate settings in the control software.
2. Calibrate Flowmeter and adjust the flowrate.
3. Check for any leakage or blockage in the spraying system.
questions.batt_a1:
1. Power the Charger.
2. Connect the battery's power cable and Balance Cable Respectively.
3. Click on start Button of charger.
4. Select Fast Charge.
questions.batt_a2:
1. Check if both RC and drone batteries are fully charged.
2. Turn off both the RC and drone.
3. Restart both devices.
4. Check the XT90 connector is fully inserted (you'll hear a click sound).
questions.batt_a3:
1. Check if the batteries can be easily disconnected from the holder.
2. IF connectors are not easily disconnected, we need to replace the connector.
questions.batt_a5:
1. Check the balance cable of charger is not damaged or loose.
2. Check connection in battery balance cable.
3. If everything is OK, battery condition is Damaged.
questions.batt_a6:
1. Use the charger provided by Company and discharge the Battery.
2. Again Charge the Battery and Monitor each Cell Voltage.
3. If difference persists, battery might be damaged.
questions.rc_q1: RC Not Connecting to the Drone
questions.rc_a1:
1. Is the RC and Drone ON?
2. Turn off both the RC and drone.
3. Restart both devices.
4. Ensure the XT90 connector is fully inserted (you'll hear a click sound).
questions.rc_a2:
1. Connect the remote to internet via WIFI.
2. Login in APP again.
3. Check the wire connection of mobile to GCS.
questions.rc_a3:
1. Check permission in app.
2. Check cable is in good condition.
3. Restart the APP.
4. Check Remote name in APP.
questions.rc_a4:
1. Check Whether the antenna is broken or detached.
2. If detached, connect the antenna Manually.
3. If broken, replace the Antenna.
questions.motor_a1:
1. Allow cooling breaks between flights.
2. Clean motors and ensure proper airflow around them.
3. Avoid flying in high-temperature conditions.
questions.motor_q2: Propellers Not Spinning After Powering On
questions.motor_a2:
1. Perform RC and GPS Authenticate Certification.
2. Check Battery Connections.
questions.motor_a3:
1. Was the Drone crashed?
2. Check if the motor's LED are working to ensure the motors are working.
3. Check the level of motor with level meter. If not leveled replace the Arm.
questions.motor_a4:
1. Check Frame type in APP and LED of the motor.
2. Check Motor Connections of power and signal.
3. If everything is OK, visit the service center.
questions.spray_a1:
1. Fill the tank with clean water and start the pump.
2. Clean all pneumatic pipes with clean water.
3. If the Pump doesn't work, replace the Pump.
questions.spray_a2:
1. First, lose the air valve.
2. Start the pump, let some water drain out from nozzles.
3. Stop the pump then tight the air valve. The problem will be solved.
questions.spray_a3:
1. Need to Clean the Flowmeter and check if it works.
2. If it doesn't work need to replace it.
questions.spray_a4:
1. Dissamble the Nozzle and clean the filter, rubber washer.
2. Check rubber washer is in good condition or not.
3. Otherwise replace it.
questions.phys_a1:
1. Check for damage to landing gear.
2. If it is in good condition, change only the landing gear joint.
questions.phys_a2: 1. Replace and check the tank is in good condition.
questions.phys_a4: 1. Check for Angle of Bend and Replace.
questions.gps_a1:
1. Wait till the drone RTH and once the drone arrives closer the remote will automatically connect.
2. Check GPS signal strength (ensure 19+ satellites).
questions.gps_a2:
1. Check in APP whether the Radars are ON or not.
2. Check Connected Status in APP.
3. If still the problem is not solved, Check the wire connection.
questions.gps_a3:
1. Change the take off position and try again.
2. Clean the Radar and try again.
3. Change the sensitivity of Radar in APP.
questions.gps_a4:
1. Connect the Drone.
2. Go to Setting/Right Top Corner Three Dots.
3. Go to Four Square Option and click on obstacle avoidance Module.
4. Increase the sensitivity of radar in APP.
questions.gps_a5:
1. Click on top right corner on Radar.
2. Make it ON.
3. Adjust height using slide bar.
4. Take off the drone, Switch Attitude mode to manual mode.
questions.gps_a6:
1. Check number of satellites.
2. Check GPS signal strength (ensure 19+ satellites).
3. If the issue persists, close the app and disconnect the battery. Reconnect the battery and Restart the APP.
questions.gen_q1: Customer Request to increase Drone Speed
questions.gen_a1:
1. Approval to be provided only after going through the flying skills of pilot.
2. Depends upon the Number of Hours and experience.
questions.gen_a2:
1. Provide internet to the phone via WIFI.
2. Go to Login option in APP.
3. Enter your User Name and Password provided by company.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions
faq.q1: How do I track my order?
faq.a1: You can track your order status directly from the Dashboard timeline.
faq.a2: All drones come with a 1-year manufacturing warranty.
faq.q3: How to register my drone on Digital Sky?
faq.a3: Our team handles the UIN registration process for you.
faq.q4: Can I upgrade my drone components?
faq.a4: Yes, please contact support for upgrade options.
faq.a5: Insurance claims can be initiated through the support portal.
